Part.Source:
&Mensagem = '' &FilCod = &ImpFilCod
For Each Order EmpCod,ImpFilCod,ImpLctCod,ImpUfeCod,ImpGruImpCod,ImpCatCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ImpFilCod = &ImpFilCod where ImpLctCod = &ImpLctCod where ImpUfeCod = &ImpUfeCod where ImpGruImpCod = &ImpGruImpCod where ImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'TABELAIMPOSTO' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&ImpLctCod)) + ', '+ trim(&ImpUfeCod) &LogErpRegCod2 = trim(str(&ImpGruImpCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(&ImpCatCod)) &LogErpRegCod3 = ''
prcCarregaLog_tabelaImpostoObs.Call(&EmpCod, ImpLctCod, ImpFilCod, ImpUfeCod, ImpGruImpCod, ImpCatCod, &Obs_sdtLogAtributosLevel)
&LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Update &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqMVA', trim(toformattedString(ImpAlqMVA)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqMVA)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmInt', trim(toformattedString(ImpAlqIcmInt)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmInt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpRedAlqIcmInt', trim(toformattedString(ImpRedAlqIcmInt)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpRedAlqIcmInt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmExt', trim(toformattedString(ImpAlqIcmExt)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmExt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpRedAlqIcmExt', trim(toformattedString(ImpRedAlqIcmExt)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpRedAlqIcmExt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpDif', trim(toformattedString(ImpDif)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpDif)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCofins', trim(toformattedString(ImpCofins)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpPis', trim(toformattedString(ImpPis)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpPis)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIPI', trim(toformattedString(ImpIPI)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpIPI)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'SitCod', trim(toformattedString(SitCod)), trim(toformattedString(&SitCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCBenef', trim(toformattedString(ImpCBenef)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCBenef)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIcmsMotDes', trim(toformattedString(ImpIcmsMotDes)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpIcmsMotDes)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCfoCod', trim(toformattedString(ImpCfoCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCfoCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstCofins', trim(toformattedString(ImpCstCofins)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCstCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstPis', trim(toformattedString(ImpCstPis)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCstPis)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpALqIcmUFDest', trim(toformattedString(ImpALqIcmUFDest)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpALqIcmUFDest)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpTaxFecop', trim(toformattedString(ImpTaxFecop)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpTaxFecop)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpPisRed', trim(toformattedString(ImpPisRed)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpPisRed)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCofinsRed', trim(toformattedString(ImpCofinsRed)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpCofinsRed)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIcmsRet', trim(toformattedString(ImpIcmsRet)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpIcmsRet)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmStUF', trim(toformattedString(ImpAlqIcmStUF)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmStUF)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqInss', trim(toformattedString(ImpAlqInss)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqInss)), &LogErpRegGUID )
if &ImpIncIpi <> '999' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIncIpi', trim(toformattedString(ImpIncIpi)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpIncIpi)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif if &ImpExcPisCofins <> '999' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpExcPisCofins', trim(toformattedString(ImpExcPisCofins)), trim(toformattedString(&ImpExcPisCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif
&Numeric = val(&ImpCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&ImpCfoCod, 1, 1) Do Case Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstIpi', trim(ImpCstIpi.ToString()), '99', &LogErpRegGUID )
Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstIpi', trim(ImpCstIpi.ToString()), '49', &LogErpRegGUID )
otherwise prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstIpi', trim(ImpCstIpi.ToString()), trim(&ImpCstIpi.ToString()), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endcase Endif //GRAVA LOG
ImpAlqMVA = &ImpAlqMVA ImpAlqIcmInt = &ImpAlqIcmInt ImpRedAlqIcmInt = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt ImpAlqIcmExt = &ImpAlqIcmExt ImpRedAlqIcmExt = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt ImpDif = &ImpDif ImpCofins = &ImpCofins ImpPis = &ImpPis ImpIPI = &ImpIPI SitCod = &SitCod ImpCBenef = &ImpCBenef
ImpIcmsMotDes = &ImpIcmsMotDes ImpCfoCod = &ImpCfoCod ImpCstCofins = &ImpCstCofins ImpCstPis = &ImpCstPis ImpALqIcmUFDest = &ImpALqIcmUFDest ImpTaxFecop = &ImpTaxFecop ImpPisRed = &ImpPisRed ImpCofinsRed = &ImpCofinsRed ImpDtaAlt = serverDate() ImpIcmsRet = &ImpIcmsRet ImpAlqIcmStUF = &ImpAlqIcmStUF ImpAlqInss = &ImpAlqinss if &ImpIncIpi <> '999' ImpIncIpi = &ImpIncIpi Endif if &ImpExcPisCofins <> '999' ImpExcPisCofins = &ImpExcPisCofins Endif
&Numeric = val(&ImpCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&ImpCfoCod, 1, 1) Do Case Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 ImpCstIpi = '99'
Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 ImpCstIpi = '49'
otherwise ImpCstIpi = &ImpCstIpi Endcase
For Each Order EmpCod,ImpFilCod,ImpLctCod,ImpUfeCod,ImpGruImpCod,ImpCatCod, ObsCod delete EndFor &Mensagem = 'Tabela de imposto Atualizada com Sucesso!'
Exit When none new EmpCod = &EmpCod ImpFilCod = &ImpFilCod ImpLctCod = &ImpLctCod ImpUfeCod = &ImpUfeCod ImpGruImpCod = &ImpGruImpCod ImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod ImpAlqMVA = &ImpAlqMVA ImpAlqIcmInt = &ImpAlqIcmInt ImpAlqIcmStUF = &ImpAlqIcmStUF ImpAlqInss = &ImpAlqinss ImpRedAlqIcmInt = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt ImpAlqIcmExt = &ImpAlqIcmExt ImpRedAlqIcmExt = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt ImpDif = &ImpDif ImpCofins = &ImpCofins ImpPis = &ImpPis ImpIPI = &ImpIPI ImpCfoCod = &ImpCfoCod SitCod = &SitCod ImpCBenef = &ImpCBenef ImpIcmsMotDes = &ImpIcmsMotDes ImpALqIcmUFDest = &ImpALqIcmUFDest ImpTaxFecop = &ImpTaxFecop ImpPisRed = &ImpPisRed ImpCofinsRed = &ImpCofinsRed ImpDtaAlt = serverDate() ImpIcmsRet = &ImpIcmsRet
&AuxImpCstCofins = &ImpCstCofins if not &AuxImpCstCofins.IsEmpty() ImpCstCofins = &AuxImpCstCofins Else &AuxImpCstCofins = NF_CstCofins.COF99 ImpCstCofins = NF_CstCofins.COF99 EndIf
&AuxImpCstPis = &ImpCstPis if not &AuxImpCstPis.IsEmpty() ImpCstPis = &AuxImpCstPis Else &AuxImpCstPis= NF_CstPIS.CST99 ImpCstPis = NF_CstPIS.CST99 Endif
&Numeric = val(&ImpCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&ImpCfoCod, 1, 1) &AuxImpCstIpi = &ImpCstIpi Do Case Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 &AuxImpCstIpi = '99' ImpCstIpi = '99'
Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 &AuxImpCstIpi = '49' ImpCstIpi = '49'
otherwise ImpCstIpi = &AuxImpCstIpi Endcase
EndNew
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'TABELAIMPOSTO' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&ImpLctCod)) + ', '+ trim(&ImpUfeCod) &LogErpRegCod2 = trim(str(&ImpGruImpCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(&ImpCatCod)) &LogErpRegCod3 = ''
&LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Insert &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqMVA', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqMVA)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmInt', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmInt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpRedAlqIcmInt', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpRedAlqIcmInt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmExt', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmExt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpRedAlqIcmExt', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpRedAlqIcmExt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpDif', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpDif)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCofins', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpPis', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpPis)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIPI', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpIPI)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'SitCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&SitCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCBenef', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpCBenef)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIcmsMotDes', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpIcmsMotDes)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCfoCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpCfoCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstCofins', '', trim(toformattedString(&AuxImpCstCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstPis', '', trim(toformattedString(&AuxImpCstPis)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpALqIcmUFDest', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpALqIcmUFDest)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpTaxFecop', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpTaxFecop)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpPisRed', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpPisRed)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCofinsRed', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpCofinsRed)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIcmsRet', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpIcmsRet)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqIcmStUF', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqIcmStUF)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpAlqInss', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpAlqinss)), &LogErpRegGUID )
if &ImpIncIpi <> '999' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpIncIpi', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpIncIpi)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif if &ImpExcPisCofins <> '999' prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpExcPisCofins', '', trim(toformattedString(&ImpExcPisCofins)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, &LogErpRegCod3, &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ImpCstIpi', '', trim(&AuxImpCstIpi.ToString()), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif //GRAVA LOG
&Mensagem = 'Tabela de imposto Inserida com Sucesso!' EndFor
commit
For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota new EmpCod = &EmpCod ImpFilCod = &ImpFilCod ImpLctCod = &ImpLctCod ImpUfeCod = &ImpUfeCod ImpGruImpCod = &ImpGruImpCod ImpCatCod = &ImpCatCod ObsCod = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod EndNew EndFor
Commit
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true prcGravaLog_TabelaImpostoObs.Call(&EmpCod, &ImpLctCod, &ImpFilCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpGruImpCod, &ImpCatCod, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, &Obs_sdtLogAtributosLevel) Endif

Parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&ImpFilCod, in:&ImpLctCod, in:&ImpUfeCod, in:&ImpGruImpCod, in:&ImpCatCod , in:&ImpAlqMVA, in:&ImpAlqIcmInt , in:&ImpRedAlqIcmInt, in:&ImpAlqIcmExt, in:&ImpRedAlqIcmExt, in:&ImpDif , in:&ImpCofins, in:&ImpPis, in:&ImpIPI, in:&SitCod, in:&ImpCBenef, in:&ImpIcmsMotDes, in:&ImpCfoCod, in:&ImpCstCofins, in:&ImpCstPis, in:&ImpCstIpi, in:&ImpALqIcmUFDest, in:&ImpPisRed, in:&ImpCofinsRed, in:&ImpTaxFecop, in:&ImpIcmsRet, in:&ImpAlqIcmStUF, in:&ImpIncIpi, in:&ImpExcPisCofins, in:&ImpAlqinss, in:&sdtObservacaoNota, in:&wwpContextUserName, out:&Mensagem);

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Incluir IPI na Base de Calculo

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Excluir ICMS da Base de Calculo do PIS/COFINS
